Food Allergy Testing

Food Allergy Testing 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is food allergy testing? 
A food allergy happens when your immune system - your body's defense against germs - overreacts to a certain food as if it was harmful. If you have symptoms after eating certain foods, food allergy testing can help find out if your symptoms are caused by an allergic reaction to those foods.
